work_orders.sync: function(doc, oldDoc) { channel('!'); if (doc.assigned_to) { channel('technician.' + doc.assigned_to); } channel('all_work_orders'); }

instructions.sync: function(doc, oldDoc) { channel('!'); if (doc.work_order_id) { channel('instructions.' + doc.work_order_id); } channel('all_instructions'); }

work_logs.sync: function(doc, oldDoc) { channel('!'); if (doc.technician_id) { channel('technician.' + doc.technician_id); } channel('all_work_logs'); }
